summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-27, REQ-28, REQ-29) to a substantial degree. TabNavigation and App.tsx are updated with the new Video Downloader tab, and a VideoDownloader.tsx module is created. However, some specific acceptance criteria details are only partially evidenced due to file truncation, particularly around Facebook stream resolution, quality option selection, and download trigger mechanics.

missing_requirements.requirement: For Facebook links, attempt to resolve downloadable stream info via a client-side fetch to publicly accessible embed endpoints.
missing_requirements.reason: The truncated VideoDownloader.tsx shows a comment indicating the implementation only shows the URL and guides the user rather than attempting a client-side fetch to publicly accessible embed endpoints as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Trigger a browser download of the video file via an anchor tag with the download attribute, or open the direct stream URL in a new tab if direct download is blocked by CORS.
missing_requirements.reason: The file is truncated before the download trigger logic and quality selection UI are visible, so it cannot be confirmed that an anchor tag with the download attribute is used or that direct stream URL opening is implemented.
